AMORT.ps1.name: Advanced Maintenance, Optimization, and Repair Tool
AMORT.ps1.description: Automated Windows 10/11 tune-up for MSP field and remote deployment.

BERET.ps1.name: BitLocker Encryption, Recovery, & Escrow Tool
BERET.ps1.description: Interactive BitLocker lifecycle manager with TPM enforcement and AD/Entra ID key escrow.

DEBLOAT.ps1.name: Deployment Environment Bloatware Liquidator & Optimized Automated Toolkit
DEBLOAT.ps1.description: Standardizes Windows 11 by removing OEM bloat and enforcing privacy and UI hardening.

DEFEND.ps1.name: Definition Enforcement & Full Endpoint Network Defense
DEFEND.ps1.description: Audits kernel-level security including TPM, Secure Boot, HVCI, and Defender.

DEPOT.ps1.name: Deployment & Endpoint Provisioning Operations Tool
DEPOT.ps1.description: Full new-machine provisioning with silent app deployment and self-delete on completion.

FACTS.ps1.name: Foxit Audit and Control Task Script
FACTS.ps1.description: Audits Foxit PDF installations and permanently blocks auto-updates via registry hardening.

MACE.ps1.name: Microsoft Application Cleanse & Eradication
MACE.ps1.description: Completely removes OneDrive, New Outlook, Office/M365, and Teams from a Windows endpoint.

ODD.ps1.name: Output Device Diagnostic
ODD.ps1.description: Inventories all physical, USB, and Bluetooth audio devices with health status and driver info.

ORCA.ps1.name: Outlook Reset & Configuration Assistant
ORCA.ps1.description: Resets broken Outlook installations for one or all user profiles, classic or new.

PRINT.ps1.name: Printer Response & Interface Network Tool
PRINT.ps1.description: Printer management utility with network scanner, driver matching, and UNC path support.

PRUNE.ps1.name: Profile Removal Utility for Neglected Entries
PRUNE.ps1.description: Interactive editor for managing Windows user profiles.

SHADE.ps1.name: System Hardening Against Data Exposure
SHADE.ps1.description: Windows 10/11 privacy hardening that disables telemetry, tracking, advertising, and phone-home behavior.

STARE.ps1.name: Scheduled Task Administration & Routine Executor
STARE.ps1.description: Interactive terminal wizard for fast and reliable Windows Scheduled Task management.

TICK.ps1.name: Trigger Immediate Clock Kickstart
TICK.ps1.description: Resets and re-syncs Windows Time service against a chosen NTP peer with before/after reporting.

URT.ps1.name: Universal Rename Tool
URT.ps1.description: Renames local or domain-joined computers from an admin shell with no GUI popups.

VITALS.ps1.name: Visual Interface for Technical Asset & Logistics Summary
VITALS.ps1.description: Collects and displays a full hardware and network snapshot including BitLocker, TPM, and domain info.

WURSA.ps1.name: Windows Update, Repair, & System Alignment
WURSA.ps1.description: Enforces OS patches, OEM driver updates, and third-party app upgrades via Chocolatey.
